server.name: dreamgraph
server.description: DreamGraph — Cognitive dreaming engine for MCP knowledge graphs

cognitive.dream_cycle: Generates speculative edges, normalizes (validate/latent/reject), promotes strong candidates to the knowledge graph
cognitive.tension_system: Detects contradictions, missing links, and weak connections. Tensions have TTL, urgency decay, domain grouping, and resolution authority.

graph_stats.note: Run a dream cycle to start building edges. The cognitive engine will speculatively connect entities and validate them.

link_schema.relation: Semantic label (e.g. reads, writes, implements, depends_on)
